work_unit: sidepanel handleDeleteText/onDeleteItem idx→id consistency fix (audit-037 SH-SIDE-L-001)
situation: audit-2026-07-08-037 SH-SIDE-L-001 finding: SidePanelApp.tsx:915 onDeleteText passes array index i instead of VerifiedText.id. Inconsistent with SH-M-005 fix at line 143-145 where deletedStack uses id-based Set for refilter reconciliation. Updated Overlay.onDeleteText prop type + call site (line 915 t.id). Updated ResultPanel.onDeleteItem signature + call site (line 122 item.id). All changes in existing opt-sidepanel worktree copy then committed via opt-worktree.sh which opened new route-fix worktree opt-sidepanel-id-delete-1783378486.
